event_types.name: Goal
event_types.description: A live goal is strongly supported by the ball crossing the goal line, a scoreboard increment, or immediate unambiguous celebration after a finish.
positive_cues: ball inside or behind the net
ball clearly over the goal line
players running away celebrating immediately after a finish
replay clearly tied to a confirmed live goal
negative_cues: ordinary shot before the result is known
save followed by no clear celebration
goalkeeper holding or parrying the ball
historical discussion of a past goal

event_types.name: Shot
event_types.description: A player attempts to score by striking, heading, or redirecting the ball toward goal, but the frame does not prove it became a goal.
positive_cues: defenders or goalkeeper reacting to a shot

event_types.name: Save
event_types.description: The goalkeeper or a defender prevents a likely goal or blocks a clear shot near the goal.
positive_cues: defensive block on the goal line

event_types.name: Dangerous Attack
event_types.description: An attacking team is in or near the final third with a promising chance, but no specific shot, goal, set piece, or foul is clearly shown.

event_types.name: Corner Kick
event_types.description: A corner kick is being taken, prepared, or replayed.
positive_cues: players gathered in penalty area for a corner
negative_cues: open-play cross from near the corner

event_types.name: Free Kick
event_types.description: A free kick restart is being prepared or taken outside the penalty spot context.

event_types.name: Penalty
event_types.description: A penalty kick is awarded, prepared, taken, saved, or scored.

event_types.name: Foul
event_types.description: Illegal physical contact, a trip, push, handball, or another stoppage-causing infringement is visible or strongly indicated.
negative_cues: card shown without visible foul context

event_types.name: Card
event_types.description: The referee shows or is clearly about to show a yellow or red card.
negative_cues: ordinary foul with no card shown

event_types.name: Substitution
event_types.description: A player substitution is happening or clearly displayed.

event_types.name: VAR Review
event_types.description: A VAR review, referee monitor check, or broadcast VAR decision sequence is visible.

event_types.name: Celebration Or Replay
event_types.description: A celebration, emotional reaction, or replay of an important moment is shown when the exact live event type is not clear.
negative_cues: active live attack with clear event type
routine crowd shot unrelated to play

event_types.name: Period Transition
event_types.description: Kickoff, halftime, full-time, restart after halftime, or another major match-period transition is shown.

event_types.name: Other Relevant
event_types.description: A clearly commentary-worthy football moment that does not fit any other configured event type.

event_types.name: No Event
event_types.description: No commentary-worthy football event is visible in the frame.
positive_cues: broadcast shot with no significant action
